'''Gruk''', or '''Green Gruk''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who was the leader of a small pack of other Gamorreans. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Gruk was on the [[Space station/Legends|space installation]] known as [[StarForge Station]] when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' showed up there, looking for more crew. Gruk joined the [[Frigate/Legends|ship]], primarily because he liked to fight.

==Biography==
Gruk, also known as Green Gruk, was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who led a small pack of fellow Gamorrean warriors.<ref name="War" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{FarOrbitDate}}</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], he was present on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[StarForge Station]], which was located<ref name="War" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="Scum">[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']]</ref> [[StarForge Nebula/Legends|StarForge Nebula]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Alliance [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' visited the station looking for new hands, as some of the crew of the ''Far Orbit'' had just [[Mutiny on the Far Orbit|mutinied]] from under Imperial control before becoming privateers. Gruk signed up for a berth on the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]], though it was because he liked to fight rather than an interest in what the privateers were doing.<ref name="War" />

{{RPGseed}}
Although Gruk was given a spot on the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], he would not obey any orders unless they came from a person who had bested him in a physical contest. If someone beat Gruk in a fight, the Gamorrean and his pack would become the followers of that individual. At some point during Gruk's service aboard the ''Far Orbit'', a strong [[Unidentified Human (Far Orbit)|Human]] engaged the Gamorrean in a duel and ended up suffering a broken back. In retaliation, a group of Human crewmen began attacking certain fellow [[Alien/Legends|alien]] crewers with [[Club/Legends|clubs]], and soon isolated beatings occurred, the targets of which were both Humans and non-Humans.<ref name="War" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Measuring 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall, Gruk was a large, smelly, and warty green Gamorrean who liked to fight. A leader of a pack of members of his [[Species/Legends|species]], he would not take orders from anyone who had not beaten him in a test of physical strength. Gruk joined the privateers not because he cared about striking back at the Empire, but because he wanted to fight. As a Gamorrean, he ate almost anything but was a messy eater.<ref name="War" />

==Skills and abilities==
Intimidating, Gruk was good at melee fighting and was fairly good at making repairs to armor. He also had the survival skills it took to stay alive<ref name="War" /> on the Gamorrean [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]].<ref name="War" />

==Equipment==
Gruk wielded an [[Axe/Legends|axe]] and wore studded [[Leather/Legends|leather]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] as well as [[Bracelet/Legends|bracelets]], [[Piercing/Legends|earrings]], armbands, and [[Ring/Legends|rings]]. Additionally, Gruk wore two [[morrt]]s,<ref name="War" /> which were [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] creatures.<ref name="Jedi">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Gruk first appeared in the adventure scenario ''[[Preparing for War]]'', published in [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and was a sequel of sorts to the previous publication, ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', carrying on that book's theme by following the ''Far Orbit''{{'s}} adventures. Gruk was provided as a sample character who could join the ship's crew at StarForge Station, and it is up to the players if he gets a berth on the ship. However, as Gruk will not obey any leader unless that person has personally bested him, this article assumes a player character beat Gruk. The size of the Gamorrean's pack can be determined by rolling a die in the game.<ref name="War" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Preparing for War|book=The Far Orbit Project}} {{1st}}
